approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

approve_result.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

resign_cause_name.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

combo.approve_result: 2=รออนุมัติ/1=อนุมัติ/0=ไม่อนุมัติ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.different_shareloan, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date ) as resign_date_tdate , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock,
sc_mem_m_resign_share.shr_qty, sc_mem_m_resign_share.shr_value, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id,
sc_com_m_branch.branch_id, sc_com_m_branch.branch_name
, ( SELECT nvl(sum( sc_mem_m_resign_loan.principal_balance ),0) FROM sc_mem_m_resign_loan WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ) ) as loan_bal /*เงินกู้ตอนคีย์ลาออก*/
,pka_com_function.fp_get_loan_balance_by_mem(sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no) as principal_balance /*เงินกู้คงเหลือ*/
, ( SELECT nvl(sum( sc_mem_m_resign_dep.dep_balance ),0) FROM sc_mem_m_resign_dep WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_dep.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ) ) as dep_bal
, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_id
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_share, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_com_m_branch, sc_mem_m_share_mem
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_share.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_br = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no) and (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status = '0') and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock = 0 /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no

r_krabi_member_resign_by_code_nest_coll.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description as membername from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card where (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no) and (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0') and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0) and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0}
